body:
@toolbox-sdk/core
Enumerations Protocol Enumeration Members MCP MCP: "2025-06-18"; MCP_v20241105 MCP_v20241105: "2024-11-05"; MCP_v20250326 MCP_v20250326: "2025-03-26"; MCP_v20250618 MCP_v20250618: "2025-06-18"; MCP_v20251125 MCP_v20251125: "2025-11-25"; Classes ToolboxClient An asynchronous client for interacting with a Toolbox service.
Constructors Constructor new ToolboxClient( url, session?, clientHeaders?, protocol?, clientName?, clientVersion?): ToolboxClient; Initializes the ToolboxClient.
Parameters Parameter Type Default value Description url string undefined The base URL for the Toolbox service API (e.g., “http://localhost:5000”). session? AxiosInstance | null undefined Optional Axios instance for making HTTP requests. If not provided, a new one will be created. clientHeaders? ClientHeadersConfig | null undefined Optional initial headers to be included in each request. protocol? Protocol Protocol.MCP - clientName? string undefined Optional name of the client package. clientVersion? string undefined Optional version of the client package. Returns ToolboxClient
Methods loadTool() loadTool( name, authTokenGetters?, boundParams?): Promise<ToolboxTool>; Asynchronously loads a tool from the server. Retrieves the schema for the specified tool from the Toolbox server and returns a callable (ToolboxTool) that can be used to invoke the tool remotely.
Parameters Parameter Type Description name string The unique name or identifier of the tool to load. authTokenGetters? AuthTokenGetters | null Optional map of auth service names to token getters. boundParams? BoundParams | null Optional parameters to pre-bind to the tool. Returns Promise<ToolboxTool>
A promise that resolves to a ToolboxTool function, ready for execution.
loadToolset() loadToolset( name?, authTokenGetters?, boundParams?, strict?): Promise<ToolboxTool[]>; Asynchronously fetches a toolset and loads all tools defined within it.
Parameters Parameter Type Default value Description name? string undefined Name of the toolset to load. If null or undefined, loads the default toolset. authTokenGetters? AuthTokenGetters | null {} Optional map of auth service names to token getters. boundParams? BoundParams | null {} Optional parameters to pre-bind to the tools in the toolset. strict? boolean false If true, throws an error if any provided auth token or bound param is not used by at least one tool. Returns Promise<ToolboxTool[]>
A promise that resolves to a list of ToolboxTool functions, ready for execution.
Interfaces ToolboxTool() A loaded, callable tool. Invoke it with an arguments object to run the tool on the remote Toolbox server. The attached methods return new ToolboxTool instances with additional auth-token getters or pre-bound parameters.
ToolboxTool(callArguments?): Promise<string>; A loaded, callable tool. Invoke it with an arguments object to run the tool on the remote Toolbox server. The attached methods return new ToolboxTool instances with additional auth-token getters or pre-bound parameters.
Parameters Parameter Type callArguments? Record<string, unknown> Returns Promise<string>
Properties authTokenGetters authTokenGetters: AuthTokenGetters; boundParams boundParams: BoundParams; clientHeaders clientHeaders: ClientHeadersConfig; description description: string; params params: ZodObject<ZodRawShape>; requiredAuthnParams requiredAuthnParams: RequiredAuthnParams; requiredAuthzTokens requiredAuthzTokens: string[]; toolName toolName: string; Methods addAuthTokenGetter() addAuthTokenGetter(authSource, getIdToken): ToolboxTool; Parameters Parameter Type authSource string getIdToken AuthTokenGetter Returns ToolboxTool
addAuthTokenGetters() addAuthTokenGetters(newAuthTokenGetters): ToolboxTool; Parameters Parameter Type newAuthTokenGetters AuthTokenGetters Returns ToolboxTool
bindParam() bindParam(paramName, paramValue): ToolboxTool; Parameters Parameter Type paramName string paramValue unknown Returns ToolboxTool
bindParams() bindParams(paramsToBind): ToolboxTool; Parameters Parameter Type paramsToBind BoundParams Returns ToolboxTool
getDescription() getDescription(): string; Returns string
getName() getName(): string; Returns string
getParamSchema() getParamSchema(): ZodObject<ZodRawShape>; Returns ZodObject<ZodRawShape>
Type Aliases AuthTokenGetter type AuthTokenGetter = () => string | Promise<string>; Returns string | Promise<string>
AuthTokenGetters type AuthTokenGetters = Record<string, AuthTokenGetter>; BoundParams type BoundParams = Record<string, BoundValue>; BoundValue type BoundValue = unknown | (() => unknown) | (() => Promise<unknown>); ClientHeadersConfig type ClientHeadersConfig = Record<string, ClientHeaderProvider>; RequiredAuthnParams type RequiredAuthnParams = Record<string, string[]>; Functions getGoogleIdToken() function getGoogleIdToken(url): Promise<string>; Parameters Parameter Type url string Returns Promise<string>
ToolboxTool() function ToolboxTool( transport, name, description, paramSchema, authTokenGetters?, requiredAuthnParams?, requiredAuthzTokens?, boundParams?, clientHeaders?): ToolboxTool; Creates a callable tool function representing a specific tool on a remote Toolbox server.
Parameters Parameter Type Default value Description transport ITransport undefined The transport for making API requests. name string undefined The name of the remote tool. description string undefined A description of the remote tool. paramSchema ZodObject<ZodRawShape> undefined The Zod schema for validating the tool’s parameters. authTokenGetters? AuthTokenGetters {} Optional map of auth service names to token getters. requiredAuthnParams? RequiredAuthnParams {} Optional map of auth params that still need satisfying. requiredAuthzTokens? string[] [] Optional list of auth tokens that still need satisfying. boundParams? BoundParams {} Optional parameters to pre-bind to the tool. clientHeaders? ClientHeadersConfig {} Optional client-specific headers. Returns ToolboxTool
An async function that, when called, invokes the tool with the provided arguments.
